biological_replicate: Blood samples were collected from 54 lung cancer patients
technical_replicate: the samples were separated into high and low groups based on the median levels of MFGE8, UBE4A and TT-EV PD-L1.
experimental_design: αPD-1 therapy in lung cancer patients
the study involves a comparison of treatment response in patients receiving αPD-1 therapy.
factor_value: lung cancer patients and αPD-1 therapy
number_of_biological_replicates: 54 lung cancer patients and 32 healthy donors
